rationale.fidelity: Correctly separates advance reservations from demand-observing, capacity-limited recourse and retains the objective and all material constraints.
rationale.managerial_framing: The planner, stakes, hedge-versus-recourse trade-off, mechanism, and a feasible counterfactual are concrete; operational setting details remain unspecified.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed, so this conditional category is treated as not applicable rather than penalized.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly labels scenario probabilities as a model assumption and bounds calibration, service, profit, and welfare claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Precise and well organized, though the layered diagnosis repeats points later in the repaired frame.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful and evidence-bounded two-stage framing; minor deductions reflect repetition and limited operational specificity, not model error.
